name: Bachelor of Arts
schedule_c_note: All three compulsory courses must be completed (30 pts total).
admission: Standard UC admission (University Entrance via NCEA, Cambridge, IB, or equivalent).
notes: Schedule C courses cannot count toward a major, minor, or specialisation. No double-counting courses between majors/minors.

name: Bachelor of Communication
schedule_c_note: Plus one of MAOR108, MAOR165, or TREO110.
notes: Communication-focused degree.

name: Bachelor of Digital Screen with Honours
admission: Standard UC admission. Progression to 400-level requires B average in 300-level major courses.
notes: BDigiScreen (360 pts) is available as an exit qualification only.

name: Bachelor of Social and Environmental Sustainability
schedule_c_note: Plus one of COMS105 or WRIT101.
schedule_e_note: Group 1 (min 15 pts): ARTS102 or STAT101. Group 2 (min 15 pts): PACE295.
notes: Sustainability-focused degree. Schedule C (105 pts) + Schedule E (min 30 pts) + Schedule V (min 270 pts).

name: Bachelor of Fine Arts
schedule_c_note: Plus 30 pts 100-level Art History.
admission: Limited entry (78 places). Portfolio submission and special application by 15 November.
notes: Studio-based degree with portfolio entry.

name: Bachelor of Music
admission: Standard UC admission. Audition required for Performance major.
notes: At least 60 of the 90 pts at 300-level must be from Music.

name: Bachelor of Commerce
schedule_c_note: BSNS201 requires 60 pts. BSNS299 (0 pts) requires 180 pts.
notes: All students take the same 7 compulsory Schedule C courses.

name: Ako: Bachelor of Teaching and Learning
pathway_options: 1 endorsement required (Early Childhood, Primary, or Mātauranga Māori)
admission: Special application by 1 Dec (domestic) / 31 Oct (international). Includes interview, literacy/numeracy tests, referee reports, police vetting, Children's Act 2014 requirements.
notes: Uses endorsement model, not majors. Year-by-year fixed programme per endorsement. Professional practice courses: max 2 attempts.

name: Bachelor of Youth and Community Leadership
schedule_c_note: Plus one of EDUC101/EDUC102/POLS103/YACL102 at 100-level. EDUC206, YACL201 at 200-level. YACL301, YACL302 at 300-level.
schedule_e_note: Min 105 pts from approved electives across 100/200/300-level.
notes: No major in BYCL. Schedule C (150 pts) + Schedule E (105 pts) + remaining from any degree. Optional minor from General Conditions for Credit.

name: Bachelor of Engineering with Honours
schedule_c_note: ENGR100 and ENGR200 are 0-point courses. Bridge courses: EMTH117/MATH101 (maths), PHYS111 (physics), CHEM114 (chemistry) for students without NCEA L3.
admission: Year 1: Executive Dean approval (standard UC admission). Year 2: competitive GPA-based allocation into discipline. Must gain Year 2 within 2 years. Intro courses max 2 attempts.
notes: Two-stage competitive model. Shared First Year then GPA-based discipline allocation. Natural Resources Engineering closed to new enrolments.

name: Bachelor of Health
schedule_c_note: HLTH321 is Health Internship (15 pts, 300-level).
admission: Standard UC admission. Mental Health & Addiction major requires police vetting for practicum.
notes: New flagship health degree, first offered 2026. Replaces BHSc (closed to new enrolments).

name: Bachelor of Social Work with Honours
schedule_e_note: (a) MAOR165 or MAOR108. (b) 45 pts from approved subjects. (c) 30 pts from listed social/health electives.
admission: Special admission with IELTS 6.5 (no band below 6.5) for non-native English speakers. Police vetting, suitability assessment, and professional code agreements at 200/300/400-level.
notes: 390 pts Schedule C + 90 pts Schedule E. Strict progression gates: 240 pts before 300-level. SOWK301 + SOWK308 before 400-level. Field Education (SOWK491/492) in final year.

name: Bachelor of Sport
schedule_c_note: SPRT110 is Practicum I. SPRT320 is Internship.
admission: Standard UC admission. Police vetting, First Aid certificate, and Children's Act 2014 checks required for practicums.
notes: Practicum chain: SPRT110 → SPRT210 → SPRT310/SPRT320.

name: Bachelor of Laws
schedule_c_note: LAWS101 (30 pts) + LAWS110 (15 pts) in Year 1. LAWS203-206 (120 pts) in Year 2 — limited entry. LAWS202 + LAWS301 in Year 3.
schedule_e_note: 300-level law electives for Years 3-4. LAWS398 Legal Ethics required for bar admission.
admission: Standard UC admission. LAWS 200-level limited entry (310-350 places per course), application by 1 December.
notes: Almost always taken as double degree (LLB/BA, LLB/BCom, LLB/BSc). Schedule C + Schedule E electives. Bar admission requires LAWS398 Legal Ethics + NZ Council of Legal Education programme. Time limit: 10 years.

name: Bachelor of Criminal Justice
schedule_e_note: Group 1 (15 pts): one of MAOR108/MAOR120/MAOR165. Group 2 (105 pts): criminal justice, psychology, history, human services electives.
notes: Can be combined as BCJ/LLB double degree. Schedule C (240 pts) + Schedule E Group 1 (15 pts Māori studies) + Group 2 (105 pts electives). Time limit: 10 years.

name: Bachelor of Science
schedule_c_note: Plus 15 pts from Schedule C Group 2 (quantitative/scientific methods).
notes: Self-selected major model (no competitive GPA placement). Environmental Science requires a second major.

name: Bachelor of Data Science
schedule_c_note: Group 2: STAT201 or STAT202. Group 3: STAT315 or STAT318.
notes: Computational Linguistics major closed to new enrolments.

name: Bachelor of Psychological Science
schedule_c_note: Plus 15 pts from HLTH106, MAOR108, TREO110, or TREO111.
pathway_options: 2nd minor or 60 pts Schedule E electives
notes: Unique structure: minors instead of majors. Must complete 1 Group 1 minor + either a 2nd minor or 60 pts Schedule E.

name: Certificate in Science
schedule_c_note: No compulsory courses. Choose 60 pts at 100/200-level from BSc Schedule V.
pathway_options: No major — choose 60 pts at 100/200-level from BSc Schedule V courses
May be awarded in any BSc subject (Schedule S)
admission: Standard UC admission. Programme approved by Executive Dean of Science.
notes: 60 pts at 100/200-level from BSc Schedule V. Can upgrade to BSc within 5 years — courses count toward BSc. Time limit: 6 years.

name: Certificate in Arts
schedule_c_note: No compulsory courses. Choose 60 pts from BA Schedule V.
pathway_options: May be awarded in a subject (min 30 pts in that subject)
Upgrades to BA or other Arts qualification
notes: 60 pts from BA Schedule V. May be awarded in: Anthropology, Art History and Theory, Chinese, Cinema Studies, Classics, Cultural Studies, Digital Humanities, Economics, Education, English, European Studies, French, Geography, German, History, Human Services, Japanese, Linguistics, Māori and Indigenous Studies, Mathematics, Media and Communication, Music, Philosophy, Political Science, Psychology, Russian, Sociology, Spanish, Statistics, Te Reo Māori. Time limit: 60 months.

name: Certificate in Commerce
schedule_c_note: No compulsory courses. Choose 60 pts from BCom Schedule V.
notes: 60 pts from BCom Schedule V. No majors or minors. Time limit: 6 years. Can upgrade to Diploma in Commerce or BCom.

name: Certificate in Sport Coaching
schedule_c_note: SPRT101 (15 pts) + 15 pts from SPRT110 or SPRT201.
schedule_e_note: Choose 15 pts from Schedule C options above, plus 30 pts from BSport Schedule V.
pathway_options: Upgrades to Bachelor of Sport Coaching
admission: Standard UC admission. Police vetting and Children's Act 2014 required for practicum courses.
notes: 30 pts Schedule C (SPRT101 + one of SPRT110/SPRT201) + 30 pts from BSport Schedule V. Can upgrade to BSpC. Time limit: 36 months. Disclosure of charges/convictions required.

name: Certificate in Languages
schedule_c_note: No compulsory courses. Choose 60 pts of language courses at 100/200-level from BA Schedule V.
pathway_options: May be awarded in one or two languages
Upgrades to Diploma in Languages or BA
notes: 60 pts of language courses at 100/200-level from BA Schedule V. Languages: Chinese, French, German, Ancient Greek, Japanese, Latin, Russian, Spanish, Te Reo Māori. Time limit: 60 months.

name: Diploma in Languages
schedule_c_note: No compulsory courses. 120 pts in one or two languages from BA Schedule V.
pathway_options: May be awarded in one or two languages
notes: 120 pts in one or two languages. Min 75 pts above 100-level (incl. 60 pts language above 100-level). Max 30 pts non-language if single language. Languages: Chinese, French, German, Ancient Greek, Japanese, Latin, Russian, Spanish, Te Reo Māori. Time limit: 72 months.

name: Diploma in Arts
schedule_c_note: Min 15 pts from BA Schedule C. Remaining from BA Schedule V (min 120 pts total).
notes: 120 pts from BA Schedule V including at least 15 pts from BA Schedule C. No majors or minors. Can upgrade to BA.

name: Diploma in Commerce
schedule_c_note: No compulsory courses. Choose 120 pts from BCom Schedule V.
pathway_options: Exit to CertCom if not completed
notes: 120 pts from BCom Schedule V. Max 30 pts transfer credit. No majors or minors. Can upgrade to BCom or exit to CertCom.

name: Diploma in Sport
schedule_c_note: All Schedule C courses required + 90 pts from Schedule E.
schedule_e_note: Min 90 pts from Schedule E to the DipSport regulations.
notes: All Schedule C courses + min 90 pts from Schedule E. First offered 2026.

name: Certificate in Education and Learning
schedule_c_note: 60 pts at 100-level+ from Schedule C or Schedule S of BTchLn (excluding AKOA courses).
admission: Must be currently or recently enrolled in BTchLn. Approved by Executive Dean of Education.
notes: Exit qualification from BTchLn. 60 pts at 100-level+ from BTchLn Schedule C or S (not AKOA courses). Time limit: 24 months. No advancing or exit qualifications.

name: Diploma in Education and Learning
schedule_c_note: 45 pts at 100-level + 75 pts at 200-level+ from BTchLn Schedule C and S (excluding AKOA courses).
admission: Must be currently or recently enrolled in BTchLn. Approved by Executive Dean of Education.
notes: Exit qualification from BTchLn. Min 45 pts at 100-level + 75 pts at 200-level+ from BTchLn Schedule C/S (not AKOA courses). Time limit: 36 months. No advancing or exit qualifications.

name: Certificate in Criminal Justice
schedule_c_note: CRJU101 Introduction to Criminal Justice (15 pts).
schedule_e_note: Group 1 (max 15 pts): MAOR108/MAOR120/MAOR165. Group 2 (max 45 pts): CRJU and elective courses.
notes: Schedule C (CRJU101) + Schedule E Group 1 (max 15 pts Māori studies) + Group 2 (max 45 pts criminal justice electives). Can upgrade to BCJ. Time limit: 48 months.

name: Certificate in Indigenous Narrative
schedule_c_note: TITO101, TITO201, TITO202 (45 pts) + 15 pts from one of: DISC101, DISC212, MAOR107, ENGL118, PACS311, or TITO301.
schedule_e_note: Choose one (15 pts) from: DISC101, DISC212, MAOR107, ENGL118, PACS311, or TITO301.
notes: Required: TITO101, TITO201, TITO202 + one of DISC101/DISC212/MAOR107/ENGL118/PACS311/TITO301. Time limit: 60 months.

name: Diploma in Global Humanitarian Engineering
schedule_c_note: ENGR101 (15 pts), ENHE101 (15 pts), ENHE301 (15 pts), ENHE401 (15 pts).
schedule_e_note: Group 1 (min 15 pts): design courses. Group 2 (min 15 pts): advanced design. Group 3 (30 pts): social science electives.
pathway_options: Not open to new enrolments in 2026
admission: Must be approved into or have completed BE(Hons) or equivalent engineering qualification.
notes: Not open to new enrolments 2026. Schedule C (60 pts) + Schedule E Group 1 (15 pts) + Group 2 (15 pts) + Group 3 (30 pts). 45 pts cross-creditable with BE(Hons). Time limit: 6 years if concurrent with BE(Hons), 36 months otherwise.

name: Diploma in Science
schedule_c_note: SCIE101 Science, Society and Me (15 pts). Remaining points from BSc Schedule V.
pathway_options: Exit to CertSc if not completed
notes: SCIE101 (Schedule C) + remaining pts from BSc Schedule V. Max 30 pts transfer credit from other institutions. Can upgrade to BSc or exit to CertSc.
